product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go — CLI binary entrypoint used to build and execute gitcode-mcp
internal/cli/cli.go — doctor command routing, JSON/text rendering, readiness aggregation
internal/config/runtime_audit.go and internal/config/effective.go — config and credential diagnostics reused by doctor
internal/cache/sqlite.go — read-only cache open and schema/status probing for doctor
internal/service/service.go and internal/service/types.go — cache, repo, sync, and index status APIs exercised by doctor
freshness: Current binary built from ./cmd/gitcode-mcp into the validation task directory; offline deterministic run with temporary cache/config and no live network access

mocks_used.external_dependencies: None. Live GitCode network/auth probing is disabled by task configuration; scenarios use local CLI execution and temporary cache paths only.
mocks_used.token: A fake environment token is used only to validate redaction and is never written to tracked expected-output files.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/004-cmd-gitcode-mcp-task-4-add-doctor-command/. The script builds a local binary in that directory and writes temporary runtime files under mktemp only.

live_validation.reason: Live validation disabled in task config. Doctor must remain deterministic and offline by default; live provider/auth probe dimensions are validated as explicit readiness report fields/statuses, not by network calls.
